## LibraryData.SubLibraryBase.getCollectionSourceItem() method

Get the FileTree source item for a collection, if available.

Returns the FileTree item that was used to load this collection. This can be passed to EditableCollection to enable direct save() functionality. Only available for collections loaded from FileTree sources.

**Signature:**

```typescript
getCollectionSourceItem(collectionId: SourceId): FileTree.FileTreeItem | undefined;
```
